title: selaginella arenicola subsp. acanthonota
intro: Selaginella arenicola subsp. acanthonota is a species of spore-producing plant, also known as resurrection fern, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella arenicola subsp. acanthonota include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical application to utilize its medicinal properties.
